description: Fixed false-positive "Required command 'node'/'npm' was not found on PATH" dashboard banners when using AddViteApp().WithBun() or other Bun-based JavaScript apps. Bun handles both install and run, so the node/npm requirements added by the default toolchain are now correctly removed when WithBun() is applied.
name: Fix false-positive node/npm required-command banners for Bun apps
